headline: Dow and Nasdaq plunge 2% as Amazon data centres hit in Iran war
summary: 10.32am: Iran is 'not just oil any more' as AWS damage moves dial US stocks have extended their slide, with selling accelerating asthe first hour of trading ticks past. The Dow is now down 1,244 points or 2.5% at 47,650, while its descent has been overtaken by the Nasdaq, which has plunged...

headline: Applied Materials Pursues AI Super Cycle As EPIC Growth Meets China Risks
summary: Applied Materials is entering what it calls a semiconductor demand "super cycle" tied to AI and advanced packaging complexity. The company is accelerating commercialization efforts through its EPIC co innovation initiative with customers, suppliers, and academic partners. Applied Materials recently settled U.S. government allegations related to shipments to China, resolving a significant legal overhang. Applied Materials, NasdaqGS:AMAT, sits at the center of semiconductor equipment demand...

headline: Jim Cramer on Applied Materials: “It Got Away From Us”
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. Inquiring about the stock, a caller noted that they are up over 4,000% in AMAT, and Cramer replied: Alright, now I will tell you that both Jeff Marks and I were talking about adding Applied Materials to the bullpen. headline: Applied Materials Conference: AMAT Sees “Super Cycle” Demand, Races to Scale for On-Time Tool Delivery
summary: Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) Semiconductor Products Group President Dr. Prabu Raja told investors and analysts that customer demand for wafer fab equipment remains high and that his top near-term priority is scaling operations to deliver tools on time.
